zh.Eresby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby於1241年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，她的父親Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby18歲，母親Sarah de Furnival18歲。她於1259年之前與Sir William de Willoughby在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1311年5月在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby于1241年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比时，她的父亲Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby18岁，母亲Sarah de Furnival18岁。她于1259年之前与Sir William de Willoughby在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1311年5月在她的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

nameMeanings.name: Beke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Beek  .
Hungarian (also Béke): most probably from a Hungarian form of the Turkish status name beg (see Beg ). Alternatively, it may be a pet form of a Hungarian personal name such as Benedek .

variants.name: Beek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johannes, Kurt, Otto.

Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or creek, beek (compare Bek 6), or a habitational name from any of various Dutch places called Beek (in Limburg, Gelderland, and North Brabant), named with the same word.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby was born in 1241, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby, was 18 and her mother, Sarah de Furnival, was 18. She married Sir William de Willoughby before 1259, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in May 1311, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby est née en 1241, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Furnival, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Willoughby avant 1259, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en mai 1311, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby 1241 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby 18 und ihre Mutter Sarah de Furnival 18. Sie hat vor 1259 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England Sir William de Willoughby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Mai 1311 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan begraben.

ko.Burial Details Unknown: 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby(이)가 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah de Furnival(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1259년 이전 영국 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 Sir William de Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1311년 5월 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a에 묻혔다.

ru.Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire: уиллоугби он т волдс, ноттингхамшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby родилась в 1241 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Furnival, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Willoughby перед 1259 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла май 1311 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан.

Se casó con Sir William de Willoughby antes de 1259, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1311, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistán.
